title: Deleting the ›has-main-video‹ relationship when it actually exists
gherkin:
Given there exists a "MAGAZINE ISSUE" "Top Gear 03_2026"
And there exists a "VIDEO" "Promo Video"
And there exists a "has-main-video" relationship "R" between "Top Gear 03_2026" and "Promo Video"
When the user deletes the "has-main-video" relationship between "Top Gear 03_2026" and "Promo Video"
Then the request should be confirmed with status code 204
And the relationship "R" should not exist anymore
